policy: Real source rows only. Raw catalogues and multi-million-row tile stores are excluded from Git history.

layers.label: 2MRS Table 3
layers.notes: Local spectroscopic anchor. Browser rows retain source identifiers, recession velocities, velocity errors, and provenance.

layers.label: 2MPZ
layers.notes: Discovery downloader validates a published per-row photo-z error field before building a local lightcone tile store.

layers.label: WISE × SuperCOSMOS
layers.notes: Chunked builder prevents the full wide photo-z catalogue from being loaded into one browser JSON document.

layers.label: DESI DR1 LSS
layers.survey: Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument Data Release 1
layers.notes: Uses official BGS, LRG, ELG and QSO clustering products selected explicitly by the user; source selection remains visible.

layers.label: Gaia DR3 local stellar context
layers.notes: Bounded public-TAP stellar sample only. Gaia is not merged into extragalactic galaxy statistics.
